mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, status, created_at, updated_at FROM ticket ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket (name, description, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ticket SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
